name: South of the Border Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet.
2. Brown the meat, about 6-8 pieces at a time. Remove from skillet and set aside.
3. Saute zucchini in the skillet for 7-10 minutes until lightly browned.
4. Return the meat to the skillet.
5. Add corn, chopped green chilies, minced garlic, salt, oregano, and cumin.
6. Simmer, stirring occasionally, about 12-15 minutes or until the meat is tender.
7. Stir in cheese until melted.
8. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve.
